LAW AND MOTION 302, A R G U E D; THE COURT RULED AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF ELIZABETH PEREGRINO'S MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSES TO PLAINTIFF'S FIRST REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS AND FOR AN ORDER IMPOSING MONETARY SANCTIONS IS GRANTED IN PART. MOTION TO COMPEL IS GRANTED. RECORDED STATEMENT AND ALL DOCUMENTS TO BE PROVIDED BY NOON ON MONDAY, JUNE 25, 2012. SANCTION IN THE AMOUNT OF $1,125.00 TO BE PAID BY JULY 13, 2012. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; COURT REPORTER: JOANNE BRYCE, CSR # 3321

LAW AND MOTION 302, A R G U E D; THE COURT RULED AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT CHARLES MOORE'S MOTION FOR RELIEF FROM WAIVER OF OBJECTIONS DUE TO LATE RESPONSES TO PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS IS DENIED. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; COURT REPORTER: JOANNE BRYCE, CSR # 3321

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Oct-19-2012 Vacated

ASSIGN TO ARBITRATION CALENDAR LIST
Off Calendar May-16-2012 Set For Trial On Dec-10-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Pltf'S First Request For Production Of Documents And For An Order Imposing Monetary Sanctions; Memo Of P&A
Off Calendar Jun-22-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. JESSICA MOY OF ANDRUS & ANDERSON LLP, TEL. NO. 986-1400 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. PAUL OTO OF THE OFFICES OF GREG DE BERNARD, TEL. NO. (925) 977-1401 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT.

RULING - A R G U E D; THE COURT RULED AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF ELIZABETH PEREGRINO'S Motion To Compel Further Responses To Plaintiff's First Request For Production Of Documents And For An Order Imposing Monetary Sanctions is granted in part. Motion to compel is granted. Recorded statement and all documents to be provided by noon on Monday, June 25, 2012. Sanction in the amount of $1,125.00 to be paid by July 13, 2012. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Harold Kahn; Court Reporter: Joanne Bryce, CSR # 3321 = (302/HEK)

Mtn For Relief From Waiver Of Objections Due To Late Responses To Pltf'S Req For Production Of Docs
Off Calendar Jun-22-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES - ATTY. JESSICA MOY OF ANDRUS & ANDERSON LLP, TEL. NO. 986-1400 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. PAUL OTO OF THE OFFICES OF GREG DE BERNARD, TEL. NO. (925) 977-1401 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT.

RULING - A R G U E D; The Court ruled as follows: DEFENDANT CHARLES MOORE'S Motion For Relief From Waiver Of Objections Due To Late Responses To Plaintiff's Request For Production Of Documents is Denied. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Harold Kahn; Court Reporter: Joanne Bryce, CSR # 3321 = (302/HEK)
